rows.label: qev035402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo! Chief! That was quite a
splendid battle, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0002
rows.name:
The extermination reward for that
monster just now... Heh, looks like
it'll fetch quite a tidy sum![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0003
rows.name:
Good work. Leave the collection of
the reward to us. Chief, you can
just disappear to wherever now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_SEL0011
rows.name:
Let your emotions take
over and snap back.

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0004
rows.name:
Gyahahahahaha! Look at this one getting
all heated up like they're somebody![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0005
rows.name:
Huh? I don't know what you're trying to
say, but basically, you're defying us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0006
rows.name:
Heh... I'll show you what happens
when you take that kind of
attitude with our Gus Team...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035402_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hey, you guys! Let's teach Quincy
Team's idiot helper a lesson!![ST:wait ]
